domain_request.notes: Input for meta-lab transduction, not direct seed authority.

human_clarification.notes: Clarifies movement, exclusions, non-admissible decisions and success condition.

operator_corpus.notes: Private/source material stays out of Git unless explicitly public.

public_contribution.notes: Visitor inputs require pre-report and operator review before any Lab contamination.

dataset_api.notes: Requires source/data-card, fallback or open data, and leakage guard.

cognitive_archives.notes: Capsules orient planning; BODY/BODY_PLUS_REFS/E2E needed for operational authority.

runtime_self_observation.notes: Cycle trace and runtime report describe how the Lab moved, not only what it produced.
